channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: US strike on Pacific vessel kills three
item.description: US military footage released Wednesday shows its latest strike on a vessel in the eastern Pacific, killing three people.

item.title: Turkiye’s Roketsan eyes top 10 exporter rank amid Middle East conflict
item.description: Turkiye has rapidly expanded its defence industry to become a leading global missile exporter amid rising conflict.

item.title: Hegseth says US to keep Iran port blockade in Hormuz, ready for new attacks
item.description: US urges resolution through talks, but says Washington 'locked and loaded' to resume attacks.

item.title: US defence secretary Pete Hegseth attacks press coverage of war on Iran
item.description: US defence secretary Hegseth criticised media coverage of the war on Iran.

item.title: Kyiv hit by deadly missile attack amid shortage of interceptors
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Audrey Macalpine explains how Ukraine’s ballistic missile interceptor shortage left Kyiv exposed to Russia’

item.title: Why the Iran war did not go according to US plans
item.description: Washington misread Iran, overestimated its own leverage and found itself trapped in a costly 40-day war of attrition.

item.title: Israeli strike destroys last working bridge over Lebanon’s Litani River
item.description: An Israeli strike has destroyed the last operational bridge over the Litani River.

item.title: Ceasefire in Lebanon ‘as important’ as in Iran, Ghalibaf says
item.description: Tehran 'striving' to compel US and Israel to permanent ceasefire in all conflict zones, Iranian parliament speaker says.

item.title: ‘Sent to be killed’: How Russia forces migrants to fight in Ukraine
item.description: Life expectancy on the front line for Central Asian migrants forced to fight for Russia in Ukraine is just four months.

item.title: Is Iran’s economy buckling under war pressure or holding up?
item.description: The Iran war has deepened the damage to its sanctions-hit economy, but oil revenues have provided a crucial cushion.
